data.body: Verification evidence: focused held-out oracle 45 passed; defect-seeded removal of completion_sidecar.emit isolation made the ambient-store HEAD assertion fail, then restoration returned green. make check passed. Full default live-corpus suite passed: 6856 passed, 59 skipped, 13 warnings in 1769.01s. Shared tracker moved during that 29m window only through attributable real reconciler/review/ticket commits; none of the synthetic namespaces reappeared during that run. A later pre-fix checkout emitted one rec-0000 PASS at d83325374; direct replay of the patched node left live tracker HEAD ce4405a3f unchanged, proving this worktree's isolation. That one event was quarantined with SHA256 e5dc11c4... and removed under the canonical lock in tickets commit 9f43cc16118b880ccbeca8e24cbc9a236c9814ba. Five-axis review: APPROVE; test-only change, production emission unchanged, no dependencies/security/performance impact.
